'''Raxus''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Raxus system/Legends|Raxus system]],<ref name="TEA" /> a part of the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony's]]<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Back Spiral]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]].<ref name="Xim Week" /> It was situated within the historical [[Greater Tion]] region,<ref name="Xim Week" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion<ref name="TEA" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Raxus lay on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Tion Trade Route]], which connected it to the [[Joxin system|Endregaad]] and [[Tion system/Legends|Tion systems]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

Raxus was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]] and [[Raxus II]],<ref name="TEA" /> and also by [[Raxus Secundus/Legends|Raxus Secundus]].<ref name="TCWEG" />
